Pleiades Sector IH-V c2-16

System / Location · First seen 3302-08-11 · 2 mentions
EDSM ↗ Inara ↗
Active: 3302-08-11 → 3302-08-18
System Overview

Pleiades Sector IH-V c2-16 is a star system in the Elite Dangerous universe, significant from 3302-08-11 to 3302-08-18. Associated with Imperial Inquisition, Pleiades Resource Enterprise, Federation. The Pleiades Resource Enterprise is preparing to assault the Empire-controlled Pleiades Sector IH-V c2-16 system. The Imperial Inquisition has called on Empire-aligned pilots to repel the Federal offensive, while the Pleiades Resource Enterprise has summoned Federation-aligned fighters.

System Data
Coordinates: [-92, -143.5, -341.3125]
Allegiance: Independent
Government: Patronage
Controlling Faction: Anti Xeno Initiative
Security: High
Economy: Military
Population: 34.4K

Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3302-08-18
Galactic News Federation Takes Pleiades Sector IH V C2 16
Following a week of conflict, the Federation has taken control of the Pleiades Sector IH-V C2-16 system from the Imperial Inquisition. The Pleiades Resource Enterprise thanked Federal pilots and framed the victory as liberation from Imperial influence.
3302-08-11
Community Goal The Fight for Pleiades Sector IH V C2 16
The Pleiades Resource Enterprise is preparing to assault the Empire-controlled Pleiades Sector IH-V c2-16 system. The Imperial Inquisition has called on Empire-aligned pilots to repel the Federal offensive, while the Pleiades Resource Enterprise has summoned Federation-aligned fighters.
